title: Emails sent by Automation cannot be formatted (HTML email customization features)
excerpt: emails being sent via automation. Currently Monday CRM allows users to format emails sent via automation as per their documentation here(https://monday.com/blog/crm-and-sales/html-emails/) and also here(Customizable Emai…

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml: emails being sent via automation. Currently Monday CRM allows users to format emails sent via automation as per their documentation here(https://monday.com/blog/crm-and-sales/html-emails/) and also here(Customizable Email Marketing Template For Teams), but Monday Work Management does not. We want the HTML email customization features available in Monday Work Management for emails sent via automation.

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YOGESHP

You can try EasyMails to easily format and design beautiful email templates using its drag-and-drop feature. It’s a simple way to create professional-looking emails without any coding.
